languages.text: "Но довольно утомлять вас нашими благодарностями. Что бы вы желали обсудить, Ваша Светлость?"

traits.locale_text: "Но довольно утомлять вас нашими благодарностями. Что бы вы желали обсудить, Ваша Светлость?"
traits.speaker: CaptainVedkaDunavski_Camp

languages.text: "But I shouldn't bore you with expressions of our gratitude. What do you wish to discuss, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"
languages.original_text: "Но довольно утомлять вас нашими благодарностями. Что бы вы желали обсудить, Ваша Светлость?"

traits.locale_text: "But I shouldn't tire you with expressions of our gratitude. What do you wish to discuss, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"
"But I shouldn't tire you with expressions of our gratitude. What do you wish to discuss, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"
"But I shouldn't bore you with expressions of our gratitude. What do you wish to discuss, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"
"But I shouldn't bore you with expressions of our gratitude. What do you wish to discuss, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"
"But I shouldn't bore you with expressions of our gratitude. What do you wish to discuss, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

languages.text: 「しかし、感謝の気持ちを述べることで、貴方を退屈にさせてはなりません。貴方は何を議論したいのですか、御{mf|殿|女}？」
languages.original_text: "But I shouldn't bore you with expressions of our gratitude. What do you wish to discuss, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

traits.locale_text: 「しかし、感謝の気持ちを述べることで、貴方を退屈にさせてはなりません。貴方は何を議論したいのですか、御{mf|殿|女}？」

languages.text: “不过，我不该用这些感激之词来烦扰您。您想谈些什么，大人？”
languages.original_text: "But I shouldn't bore you with expressions of our gratitude. What do you wish to discuss, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

traits.locale_text: “不过，我不该用这些感激之词来烦扰您。您想谈些什么，大人？”

languages.text: "Fakat sizi minnettarlık ifadelerimizle sıkmamalıyım. Neyi konuşmak istersiniz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri?"
languages.original_text: "But I shouldn't bore you with expressions of our gratitude. What do you wish to discuss, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

traits.locale_text: "Fakat sizi minnettarlık ifadelerimizle sıkmamalıyım. Neyi konuşmak istersiniz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri?"

languages.text: «Pero no quiero aburrirle expresando nuestro agradecimiento. ¿De qué quería hablar, mi{mf|lord|lady}?».
languages.original_text: "But I shouldn't bore you with expressions of our gratitude. What do you wish to discuss, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

traits.locale_text: «Pero no quiero aburrirle expresando nuestro agradecimiento. ¿De qué quería hablar, mi{mf|lord|lady}?».

languages.text: « Mais je ne devrais pas vous ennuyer avec ces paroles de gratitude. De quoi souhaitez-vous parler, Votre Seigneurie ? »
languages.original_text: "But I shouldn't bore you with expressions of our gratitude. What do you wish to discuss, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

traits.locale_text: « Mais je ne devrais pas vous ennuyer avec ces paroles de gratitude. De quoi souhaitez-vous parler, Votre Seigneurie ? »

languages.text: "Aber ich sollte Euch nicht mit Dankesbekundungen langweilen. Was wollt Ihr besprechen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}?"
languages.original_text: "But I shouldn't bore you with expressions of our gratitude. What do you wish to discuss, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

traits.locale_text: "Aber ich sollte Euch nicht mit Dankesbekundungen langweilen. Was wollt Ihr besprechen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}?"
